title: London Underground 2009 Tube Stock
description: This is the LU2009TS made by Dovatail, it is made to a 1:1 scale and has realistic(ish) sounds. You are free to use it but NO modifications without my permission and if you show it online can u credit me because I worked very hard on this project.
body:
***************************************************************
London Underground 2009 Stock Resource Pack
***************************************************************

Description:
London Underground 2009 Tube Stock Resource Pack for Minecraft Step into the world of the London Underground with this detailed and immersive resource pack! Based on the 2009 Tube Stock, this pack brings authentic textures and designs to your Minecraft world, perfect for recreating the iconic London transport system. Whether you're building bustling underground stations or running your own railway network, this pack ensures a realistic experience with custom sounds, signage, and train details. Hop aboard and bring the London Underground to life—mind the gap!

V3 has received displays and floor maps and a great deal of optimisation by having only a third of the total face count and only using 3 instead of 5 .obj model files leading to a lot more smoother gameplay.

Installation:

Open Minecraft and go to Options > Resource Packs > Open Resource Pack Folder.

Drag and drop the "LU2009TS_CA [MTR 4].zip" file into the Resource Pack folder.

Activate the resource pack in Minecraft by moving it to the “Selected Resource Packs” list.


Usage:
Personal Use: Feel free to use this resource pack in your personal Minecraft worlds and projects.

Modification: You are free to use it but NO modifications without my permission and if you show it online can u credit me because I worked very hard on this project.

Redistribution: Redistribution of this resource pack is prohibited without permission. Do not upload or share this resource pack on other websites or platforms.

Playing: For the best sound set the acceleration to 2.0m/s. Initially there will be pause when first loading the train into the world but it runs smoothly after that no matter the distance. [MTR 3 ONLY] The 'Free length' variant has no disable/D car.


Credits:
Original Creator: Dovatail [Chamuel]

Special Thanks: Georgie, Class_345, Navi / Merric (LX9702), ExtremeMakerX, Aecth the Noodle Dragon, szandorthe13th

Contact:
For any questions or permission requests, please contact me on discord: @dovatail
